query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as qualifying_projects
FROM (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  WHERE p.suppressed = 0
    AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
    AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
    AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL OR p.projectState = 'OFFSHORE_AU')
    AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING COUNT(c.id) >= 1
) t;

SELECT COUNT(*) as qualifying_projects
FROM (
  SELECT p.id
  FROM projects p
  LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
  LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL
  WHERE p.suppressed = 0
    AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
    AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
    AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL OR p.projectState = 'OFFSHORE_AU')
    AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
  GROUP BY p.id
  HAVING COUNT(c.id) >= 1
) t;
